headline: How FBI Rapid DNA Approval Shapes Thermo Fisher Scientific’s (TMO) Long-Term Forensics Strategy
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific’s board previously authorized a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.47 per share, paid on October 15, 2026, to shareholders of record on September 15, 2026. More recently, its Applied Biosystems RapidINTEL Plus Cartridge gained FBI approval for generating CODIS-searchable Rapid DNA crime scene profiles, expanding the company’s role in forensic workflows. We’ll now consider how FBI approval of Thermo Fisher’s RapidINTEL Plus Cartridge may influence the company’s...

headline: Thermo Fisher (TMO) Stock May Be Undervalued As Guidance Rises
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific stock has delivered a 32.0% gain over the past year, and the latest Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate points to meaningful upside relative to the current US$532.48 share price, while broader valuation checks point to a more mixed picture. The 32.0% return over the last 12 months suggests sentiment has been positive, raising the bar for what counts as good value today. On the upside, recent acquisitions and collaborations in areas like mRNA therapies...
